coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 296-group, 2,413-node closure, including its six-object pipe structure collection.
validation: The authored six-way pipe layout, generated sleeves, SDF joint shell, dual-mesh smoothing, and structure toggle run in-browser. Collection Info preserves Blender's Relative affine matrix through the instance-domain For Each zone. Resample Curve now builds Blender-compatible float32 tangents and minimum-twist normals, and Curve to Mesh consumes that evaluated frame; all 3,010 torus positions before the hull now match Blender exactly. The imported six-object structure is exact at 4,968 / 4,758, the non-cap sleeve sweep is topology-exact at 10,578 / 10,326, and the complete procedural hull input is exact at 28,638 / 28,386. The current authored result is 11,230 / 8,116 versus Blender's 11,162 / 8,064 (0.61% vertex delta and exact collection bounds); joint-size is within 0.31%, bone preview is topology-exact at 31,447 / 28,386, and hidden-structure/bone bounds differ by at most 0.0586 Blender units. The first remaining topology divergence is the coordinate-sensitive Convex Hull/custom ETK remesh boundary: Blender's captured local-space input reproduces the exact 1,507 / 2,572 Bullet hull, while the browser-evaluated relative input leaves a 52-face final remesh residual.
